title: Hued Mobs
description: Make every individual mob more diverse with a hue shift!
body:
This mod makes it so that every individual creature spawns with a randomized hue shift, increasing diversity among all mobs in the game.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Z8Z714G8U7)
